recommendations.title: Turning Red
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Mei is experiencing the awkwardness of being a teenager with a twist – when she gets too excited, she transforms into a giant red panda.

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: A Letter to Momo
recommendations.overview: A shy 11-year-old's life takes a strange turn when she discovers three hungry goblins living in the attic of her new house. She misses her old life. She misses her father so very much. Until she makes some new ghoulish friends.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Super Mario Brothers: Great Mission to Rescue Princess Peach
recommendations.overview: When Princess Peach is kidnapped by the monster King Koopa, Mario and his brother Luigi journey to the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue her.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.
